name: gm/faq-accordion
title: FAQ Accordion
description: Collapsible FAQ section with questions and answers.

default.question: How long does game localization take?
default.answer: The timeline depends on the scope of your project, but typically ranges from 2-8 weeks for standard localization projects.

default.question: What languages do you support?
default.answer: We support over 50 languages including major markets like Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Russian, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and many more.

default.question: Do you provide voice acting services?
default.answer: Yes, we work with professional voice actors who specialize in gaming and have experience with various game genres and character types.
